channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: rivet-gg/rivet
item.description: 🔩 Run and scale realtime applications with Rivet Actors.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: tw93/Pake
item.description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with Rust. 🤱🏻 利用 Rust 轻松构建轻量级多端桌面应用

item.title: bevyengine/bevy
item.description: A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

item.title: paradigmxyz/reth
item.description: Modular, contributor-friendly and blazing-fast implementation of the Ethereum protocol, in Rust

item.title: probe-rs/probe-rs
item.description: A debugging toolset and library for debugging embedded ARM and RISC-V targets on a separate host

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: YaLTeR/niri
item.description: A scrollable-tiling Wayland compositor.

item.title: starkware-libs/cairo
item.description: Cairo is the first Turing-complete language for creating provable programs for general computation.

item.title: fish-shell/fish-shell
item.description: The user-friendly command line shell.

item.title: pola-rs/polars
item.description: Dataframes powered by a multithreaded, vectorized query engine, written in Rust

item.title: google/comprehensive-rust
item.description: This is the Rust course used by the Android team at Google. It provides you the material to quickly teach Rust.

item.title: jtroo/kanata
item.description: Improve keyboard comfort and usability with advanced customization

item.title: iced-rs/iced
item.description: A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm

item.title: modrinth/code
item.description: The Modrinth monorepo containing all code which powers Modrinth!

item.title: 0xPlaygrounds/rig
item.description: ⚙️🦀 Build portable, modular & lightweight Fullstack Agents

item.title: wez/wezterm
item.description: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

item.title: vercel/turborepo
item.description: Build system optimized for JavaScript and TypeScript, written in Rust

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: zellij-org/zellij
item.description: A terminal workspace with batteries included

item.title: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
item.description: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: gfx-rs/wgpu
item.description: A cross-platform, safe, pure-Rust graphics API.

item.title: golemcloud/golem
item.description: Golem is an open source durable computing platform that makes it easy to build and deploy highly reliable distributed systems.

item.title: LGFae/swww
item.description: A Solution to your Wayland Wallpaper Woes
